title: populus trichocarpa var. hastata
intro: Populus trichocarpa var. hastata, also known as Black Cottonwood or Western Black Cottonwood, is a deciduous tree species belonging to the Populus genus. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The bark and leaves of Populus trichocarpa var. hastata have been used to create herbal preparations such as teas, salves, and infusions, which are believed to offer health benefits like reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations from this plant have been traditionally used to support overall well-being and to alleviate symptoms associated with various health issues.
